title: Kimco Realty Corporation (KIM) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Kimco Realty Corporation (NYSE:KIM ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants David Bujnicki - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations and Strategy Conor Flynn - Chief Executive Officer Ross Cooper - President, Chief Investment Officer Glenn Cohen - Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer David Jamieson - Executive Vice President, Chief Operating Officer Conference Call Participants Michael Goldsmith - UBS Samir Khanal - Evercore ISI Juan Sanabria - BMO Capital Markets Haendel St. Juste - Mizuho Alexander Goldfarb - Piper Sandler & Co. Craig Mailman - Citi Investment Research Floris van Dijkum - Compass Point Craig Schmidt - Bank of America Ki Bin Kim - Truist Ronald Kamdem - Morgan Stanley Wesley Golladay - Baird Michael Mueller - JPMorgan Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Kimco Realty Corporation's Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Kimco (KIM) Q3 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates, '22 View Up
text: Kimco's (KIM) third-quarter results outshine estimates, with the top line growing year over year. It raises 2022 outlook for FFO.

title: Kimco Realty (KIM) Surpasses Q3 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Kimco Realty (KIM) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 5.13% and 2.35%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Kimco Realty® Announces Third Quarter 2022 Results
Kimco (KIM) to Report Q3 Earnings: Is a Beat in the Cards?
text: Pent-up consumer demand and focus on its grocery-anchored centers and mixed-use assets are likely to have aided Kimco's (KIM) Q3 earnings.

title: Kimco Well Positioned For Kroger/Albertsons Merger
text: M&A often affects more than just the companies involved. In this case, Kimco is set up for a large gain on its investment which will help fuel its growth.

title: Kimco's Dividend Is Set For Further Growth
text: Kimco shares have fallen over the past five months, creating a compelling entry point for income investors. Its business has recovered since the COVID lows with occupancy and rental rates up, traffic back to normal, and AFFO per share above pre-COVID levels.

title: REIT Kimco Realty sold more than $300 million of Albertsons stock after buyout deal with Kroger was announced
text: Kimco Realty Corp. said Friday that it sold off more than a quarter of its stake in Alberstons Companies Inc. ACI, -7.74% , after Albertsons announced the deal to be acquired by Kroger Co. KR, -5.89% in a deal valued at $24.6 billion. Kimco said it sold 11.5 million Albertsons shares to generate proceeds of about $301.1 million, which implies a sale price of roughly $26.18.

title: Kimco to Realize Meaningful Incremental Value from Kroger-Albertsons Merger
Is it Wise to Retain Kimco (KIM) Stock in Your Portfolio Now?
text: Kimco's (KIM) focus on its grocery-anchored centers, mixed-use assets and a solid balance sheet bode well for its growth. However, the rise in e-commerce adoption and higher interest rates are woes.

title: Will Retail REITs Continue to Rebound in the Holiday Season?
text: Retail REITs like O, SPG, KIM and FRT are poised to benefit amid pent-up consumer demand with the waning of the pandemic impact and a favorable job-and-wage growth environment, supporting consumer confidence.
